title: Yosys fails to infer BRAM with complex enable logic

features.name: BRAM inference with chained elsif enable logic
features.description: Code should include a BRAM inference with chained elsif conditions for read/write enable logic in a clocked always block, where the enable priority chain includes reset, read enable, and write enable signals
features.snippet:
reg [7:0] bram[0:255];
always @(posedge clk) if (reset) dummy <= 1'b0; else if (re) rdata <= bram[addr]; else if (we) bram[addr] <= wdata;
